info.title: SupaVector API
info.description: SupaVector provides hybrid retrieval, grounded answers, and long-term memory APIs for multi-tenant agents. Recommended integration model: bootstrap once, store a service token, and let your backend or runtime agent call SupaVector directly. Use JWTs mainly for human admin sessions. If you want SupaVector to keep its own Postgres/auth runtime but use your own provider key for a request, send the matching request-scoped header on supported sync routes: X-OpenAI-API-Key, X-Gemini-API-Key, or X-Anthropic-API-Key. Those overrides are request-scoped and are rejected by asynchronous memory reflect/compact flows. All /v1 endpoints return a standard response envelope: { ok, data|error, meta }. For idempotent write endpoints, send a unique Idempotency-Key per logical request.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Preset model catalog and current instance defaults.

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Hybrid vector plus lexical retrieval over indexed chunks.

tags.name: Ask
tags.description: Question answering with citations from retrieved context.

tags.name: Memory
tags.description: Memory write/recall and AMV-L lifecycle operations (tiered HOT/WARM/COLD retrieval gating).

ModelId.description: Provider-native model id. SupaVector publishes its current preset catalog at GET /v1/models, but custom model ids are also allowed.

answerProvider.description: Tenant override for ask generation provider. null or empty clears the override and falls back to the instance default.

answerModel.description: Tenant override for ask generation. null or empty clears the override and falls back to the instance default.

booleanAskProvider.description: Tenant override for boolean_ask generation provider. If unset, boolean_ask follows the tenant answerProvider or instance default.

booleanAskModel.description: Tenant override for boolean_ask generation. If unset, boolean_ask follows the tenant answerModel or instance default.

compactProvider.description: Tenant override for compaction provider. If unset, compaction follows the tenant reflectProvider or instance default.

compactModel.description: Tenant override for compaction jobs. If unset, compaction follows the tenant reflectModel or instance default.

favorRecency.description: When true, retrieval applied an additional freshness bias.

timeField.description: Time field used for any applied since/until filtering.
Use freshness to apply since/until against metadata timestamps such as updatedAt or syncedAt.

answerLength.description: Controls answer depth. auto adapts based on retrieved source detail.

favorRecency.description: When true, retrieval adds a freshness bias so newer matching memories rank higher.

answerLength.description: Effective answer length used by generation.

timeField.description: Use freshness to apply since/until against metadata timestamps such as updatedAt or syncedAt.

answerLength.description: Controls answer depth. auto adapts based on retrieved source detail.

task.description: Optional code task hint such as debug, review, write, or structure.

favorRecency.description: When true, retrieval adds a freshness bias so newer matching memories rank higher.

BooleanAskAnswer.description: Strict boolean response. invalid means the input was not a grounded true/false question for the provided sources.

timeField.description: Use freshness to apply since/until against metadata timestamps such as updatedAt or syncedAt.

favorRecency.description: When true, retrieval adds a freshness bias so newer matching memories rank higher.

MemoryPolicy.description: Memory policy mode. Defaults to amvl when omitted.

valueScore.description: AMV-L memory value score after incremental decay/reinforcement update.

valueLastUpdateTs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds for the last value update.

tierLastUpdateTs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds for the last tier transition.

favorRecency.description: When true, recall adds a freshness bias so newer matching memories rank higher.

timeField.description: Use freshness to apply since/until against metadata timestamps such as updatedAt or syncedAt.

get.description: Public health probe for gateway + vector TCP connectivity.

get.summary: List preset models and current instance defaults

notes.compatibility: SupaVector omits unsupported temperature parameters automatically for reasoning-style OpenAI models. Gemini and Anthropic use provider-native request formats.
notes.availability: Model availability depends on your provider account, enabled APIs, and region.
notes.requestScopedKeys: Use X-OpenAI-API-Key, X-Gemini-API-Key, or X-Anthropic-API-Key to override provider credentials per request.

get.description: Return SupaVector's curated provider-aware preset catalog, including the CLI numeric shortcuts, plus the current instance defaults. Custom model ids remain allowed anywhere a model field is supported.

post.description: Authenticate with username/password and receive a JWT bearer token.

get.description: Read tenant auth settings and tenant-level generation provider/model defaults (admin role required).

patch.description: Update tenant auth settings and tenant-level generation provider/model defaults. embedProvider and embedModel are intentionally instance-wide and are not updated here.
Update tenant authentication policy (admin role required).

get.description: List service tokens for the current tenant (admin role required).

post.description: Create a service token for API-key auth (admin role required).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Service token numeric ID.

delete.description: Revoke a service token by ID (admin role required).

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Collection scope (defaults to default).

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Optional tenant override for admin-compatible clients.

get.description: List indexed documents visible to the authenticated principal.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to make indexing idempotent.

example.text: SupaVector stores semantic memories for agents and supports tenant-scoped retrieval.

post.description: Index raw text into semantic chunks for retrieval and question answering.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to make indexing idempotent.

post.description: Fetch a public URL and index extracted text. Private/local hosts are blocked for safety.

delete.description: Delete vectors/chunks associated with a document id in the selected collection.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query text for hybrid vector and lexical retrieval.

parameters.name: k
parameters.description: Top-k result count.

parameters.name: policy
parameters.description: Optional retrieval policy: amvl, ttl, or lru.

parameters.name: docIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated docIds

parameters.name: namespaceIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated namespace ids.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags; retrieval requires overlap with the stored tag list.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: Restrict retrieval to one agent-scoped source.

parameters.name: sourceTypes
parameters.description: Comma-separated source types such as url, file, or ticket.

parameters.name: documentTypes
parameters.description: Comma-separated metadata document types.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Lower bound for createdAt or freshness filtering.

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Upper bound for createdAt or freshness filtering.

parameters.name: timeField
parameters.description: Use freshness to apply since/until against metadata timestamps such as updatedAt or syncedAt.

parameters.name: favorRecency
parameters.description: Bias retrieval toward fresher matching items. Query-sensitive freshness auto mode can also turn this on when enabled at the server.

get.description: Run hybrid vector plus lexical retrieval with namespace, source, document-type, tag, and time-window filters, then return ranked chunk hits.

post.description: Retrieve relevant chunks and generate a grounded answer with citations. `provider` and `model` can override the tenant or instance generation defaults for this request. Retrieval still uses the instance-wide embedding provider/model, and supports first-class filters plus freshness-aware time windows.

example.question: Why would newer synced product records rank above stale ones here?

post.description: Retrieve relevant chunks and generate a grounded code-aware answer. `provider` and `model` can override the tenant or instance generation defaults for this request. Retrieval still uses the instance-wide embedding provider/model, and supports first-class filters plus freshness-aware time windows.

example.question: Is SupaVector designed for agent memory retrieval?

post.description: Retrieve relevant chunks and return a grounded answer constrained to true, false, or invalid, including supporting chunks. `provider` and `model` can override the tenant or instance generation defaults for this request. Retrieval still uses the instance-wide embedding provider/model, and supports first-class filters plus freshness-aware time windows.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to make memory writes idempotent.

example.text: Use idempotency keys for memory and indexing writes.
example.title: Idempotency guidance

post.description: Write a memory item and index it for future recall.

example.query: How do we avoid duplicate writes?

post.description: Semantic recall over memory items with optional type/time/tag filters.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to make reflect job creation idempotent.

post.description: Queue reflection job(s) to derive semantic/procedural/summary memories from an artifact or conversation source.
Queue TTL cleanup. Use dryRun=true to preview impact safely.
Queue compaction to summarize/reduce redundant memory items.
Submit positive/negative feedback signal for a memory item.
Submit task outcome events to influence trust/utility scoring.

get.description: Poll an async job until status is succeeded or failed.
Internal runtime statistics for platform diagnostics/operations.

vector.description: Vector-store health and ANN index readiness.

runtime.description: ANN/exact search mode, rollout, fallback, shadow-overlap, and circuit-breaker runtime state.

reindex.description: Current and last vector reindex state.

get.description: Admin-only dense vector search runtime diagnostics for ANN rollout and exact fallback monitoring.

post.description: Start an admin-triggered vector rebuild from stored chunks. Use after embedding-model changes, vector-store restores, or ANN/vector count mismatch remediation.
